LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT GRETCHEN KREBS MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS AND FOR ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS: THE LIS PENDENS HAS ALREADY BEEN EXPUNGED, THAT MATTER IS MOOT. THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $2565. $2500 IS ATTORNEYS FEES (10 HOURS AT $250 AN HOUR) AND $65 IN COSTS. PARTIES ARE TO MEET AND CONFER IN PREPARING A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-01-2006 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-03-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

Notice Of Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And For Attorneys Fees And Costs; Declaration Of Nicole Ingle; P/A; Proposed Order
Off Calendar Aug-01-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
R. Boyd McSparran of Goldstein Gellman Melbostad Gibson & Harris, LLP, 673-5600, appearing for plaintiff and responding party
Paul Tour-Sarkissian of the Tour-Sarkissian Law Offices, 626-7744, appearing for defendant and moving party

This matter was argued. DEFENDANT GRETCHEN KREBS Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens And For Attorneys Fees And Costs: The Lis Pendens has already been expunged, that matter is moot. The Court granted the motion for attorney's fees and costs in the amount of $2565. $2500 is attorneys fees (10 hours at $250 an hour) and $65 in costs. Parties are to meet and confer in preparing a form of order. (301/PJB/xAS) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189
